mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_competency_diagnosis) AS cumulative, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_diagnosis_session WHERE DATE(started_at) = CURDATE()) AS todayStarted
SELECT persona_code AS personaCode, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_user_profile WHERE persona_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY persona_code ORDER BY persona_code

SELECT SUM(ord >= 1) AS s1, SUM(ord >= 2) AS s2, SUM(ord >= 3) AS s3, SUM(ord >= 4) AS s4, SUM(ord >= 5) AS s5, SUM(ord >= 6) AS s6 FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 6 WHEN current_step = 'step6' THEN 6 WHEN current_step = 'step5' THEN 5 WHEN current_step = 'step4' THEN 4 WHEN current_step = 'step3' THEN 3 WHEN current_step = 'step2' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS ord FROM sys_diagnosis_session ) t
SELECT SUM(rating >= 4) AS up, SUM(rating <= 2) AS down FROM sys_ai_report_survey WHERE rating IS NOT NULL
SELECT AVG(faithfulness_score) AS faithfulness, AVG(accuracy_score) AS accuracy, AVG(job_reflection_score) AS jobReflection, AVG(relevance_score) AS relevance FROM sys_ai_report_quality
SELECT rating, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_ai_report_survey WHERE rating IS NOT NULL GROUP BY rating

SELECT CONCAT('BATCH-', DATE_FORMAT(executed_at, '%y%j'), '-', LPAD(batch_id, 3, '0')) AS id, batch_type AS type, DATE_FORMAT(executed_at, '%H:%i') AS ts, processed_count AS cnt, duration_seconds AS dur, status AS status FROM sys_batch_history ORDER BY executed_at DESC LIMIT 5
